name: bounce-guard-critic
scope: Landing-page experiments that lift reward while risking first-session bounce-rate regression.
description: Flags visual, CSS, and copy changes that may increase immediate exits even when aggregate reward appears positive.
rationale: Week 3 produced a gate-failing image win and a harmful CSS rollback, so Webster needs a dedicated critic for bounce-risk patterns before conservative W4 tuning ships.
severity_rubric: P0 when a proposed change repeats a known bounce-rate gate failure; P1 when visual urgency may increase exits; P2 when copy or spacing weakly suggests bounce sensitivity.
